message:
test(fwc): expand tests for 8 more modules (+448 tests)

validate 19→64, export_tools 23→67, json_diff 25→77,
search 39→81, batch 32→68, schema_nav 41→76,
render 54→97, history 55→96. Covers type validation,
tool export, diff rendering, search scoring, batch parsing,
schema navigation, output rendering, and history operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
